creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Sep 13, 2007 at 03:57:36AM -0700, bf wrote:

> computer, with the error message: "dialog: stack
> overflow in function main", when I use the default
> choices for the drivers (even when I'm not building
> the freetype bridge).  I don't think that this is

This should be fixed in -STABLE branch some time ago.

Regards,
Rong-en Fan
